Fetch.Script: SELECT job_config_id, job_name, job_type, enabled, trigger_type, cron_expression, interval_seconds, start_at, end_at, parameters, created_at, updated_at,TargetType,TargetMethod,Args,orgid FROM scheduler.job_config where enabled  = true and job_config_id=7

GetJobExtn.Script: select filter, comments from scheduler.job_extns where orgid = @orgId and job_config_id = @JobConfigId

CreateExecutionCycle.Script: INSERT INTO scheduler.job_exe_hist(job_exe_hist_id, job_config_id, started_at, finished_at, exe_status, download_lnk, orgid, fireinstanceid, triggerobject, jobdetailobject,firetimeutc) VALUES(nextval('scheduler.job_exe_hist_job_exe_hist_id_seq'::regclass), @job_config_id, now(), null, @exe_status, null, @orgid, @fireinstanceid, @triggerobject, @jobdetailobject,now()) RETURNING job_exe_hist_id

UpdateExecutionStatus.Script: UPDATE scheduler.job_exe_hist SET exe_status = @exe_status WHERE job_exe_hist_id = @job_exe_hist_id

WriteExecutionLog.Script: INSERT INTO scheduler.job_exe_logs(job_exe_log_id, orgid, job_exe_hist_id, created_on, exe_logs, loglevel)VALUES(nextval('scheduler.job_exe_logs_job_exe_log_id_seq'::regclass), @orgid, @job_exe_hist_id, now(), @exe_logs, @loglevel)

GetLastJobTriggered.Script: select job_exe_hist_id as JobExeHistId, job_config_id as JobConfigId, started_at as StartedAt, finished_at as FinishedAt, exe_status as ExeStatus, download_lnk as DownloadLnk, orgid as OrgId, firetimeutc as FireTimeUtc, fireinstanceid as FireInstanceId, triggerobject as TriggerObject, jobdetailobject as JobDetail from scheduler.job_exe_hist where job_config_id =  @JobConfigId and orgid = @orgId AND fireinstanceid = COALESCE(@FireInstanceId, fireinstanceid) order by job_exe_hist_id desc FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

UpdateTriggeredJobStatus.Script: UPDATE scheduler.job_exe_hist set exe_status = @exe_status, finished_at = now() where job_exe_hist_id = @job_exe_hist_id and orgid = @orgid

GetJobTriggerDetails.Script: select job_exe_hist_id, job_config_id, started_at, finished_at, exe_status, download_lnk, orgid, firetimeutc, fireinstanceid, triggerobject, jobdetailobject from scheduler.job_exe_hist where job_exe_hist_id = @job_exe_hist_id and orgid = @orgid

GetPendingTasks.Script: SELECT id, filepath, orgid FROM hms.fileprocessingtasks WHERE status = 'Pending' AND filetype = 'agent_create'

GetChunkSize.Script: SELECT config_value FROM hms.api_config WHERE config_key = @key LIMIT 1

BulkCopyTempAgent.Script: COPY hms.tempagentdto (agentid, agentcode, agentname, businessname, firstname, middlename, lastname, prefix, suffix, dob, nationality, preferredlanguage, agentlevel, staffcode, supervisor_code, contracteddate, agentstatuscode, statusdate, islicensed, maskedpannumber, aadhaar_number, irdalicensenumber, gstnumber, createdby, createddate, modifiedby, modifieddate, rowversion, isactive, applicationdocketno, father_husband_nm, employeecode, startdate, panaadharlinkflag, sec206abflag, packageid, taxstatus, stateeid, urn, additionalcomment, appointmentdate, incorporationdate, cnctpersondesig, cnctpersonmobileno, cnctpersonemail, cnctpersonname, cmsagenttype, servicetaxno, ulipflag, traininggrouptype, ifs, refreshertrainingcompleted, ismigrated, mainpartnerclientcode, agentmaincodevweid, registrationdate, vertical, branchcode, branchname, ic36trngcompletiondate, strngcompletiondate, confirmationdate, fgrockstartrainingdate, incrementdate, lastpromotiondate, hrdoj, fgvaluetrngdate, hsecpolicytrngdate, itsecpolicytrngdate, npstrngcompletiondate, whistleblowertrngdate, govpolicytrngdate, inductiontrngdate, lastworkingdate, licenseno, licensetype, licenseissuedate, licenseexpirydate, licensestatus, addressline1, addressline2, addressline3, city, state, pin, landmark, comments, reason, orgid, agent_class_desc, bank_acc_type_desc, gender_desc, title_desc, channel_desc, sub_channel_desc, occupation_desc, agent_type_cat_desc, marital_status_desc, education_desc, state_desc, country_desc, designation_code_desc, location_code_desc, agent_type_code_desc, agent_sub_type_code_desc, candidate_type_desc, commission_class_desc, agent_type_desc, nomineename, relationship, percentageshare, nomineeage, accountholdername, accountnumber, ifsc, micr, bankname, accbranchname, accounttype, activesince, factoringhouse, preferredpaymentmode, dateofbirth, pannumber, email, mobileno, workcontactno, residencecontactno, bloodgroup, birthplace, martial_status_desc, pinfo_education_desc, educationlevel, workprofile, annualincome, workexpmonths, branch_desc) FROM STDIN (FORMAT BINARY)

FinalizeAgent.Script:
WITH master_map AS (
    SELECT
        t.agentcode,
        t.orgid,
        cm.channel_id AS channel_id,
        cm.channel_code AS channel_code,
        scm.sub_channel_id AS sub_channel_id,
        dm.designation_code AS designation_code,
        dm.designation_id AS designation_id,
        lm.location_master_id AS location_id,
        bm.branch_id AS branch_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'BANK_ACC_TYP'           THEN k.entryidentity END) AS bankacctype,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'AGENT_TYPE_CAT'        THEN k.entryidentity END) AS agent_type_cat,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'AGENT_CLASS'           THEN k.entryidentity END) AS agent_class,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'MARITAL_STATUS'        THEN k.entryidentity END) AS marital_status,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'EDUCATION_CODE'        THEN k.entryidentity END) AS education,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'STATE_NAME'            THEN k.entryidentity END) AS state,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'COUNTRY'               THEN k.entryidentity END) AS country,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'GENDER'                THEN k.entryidentity END) AS gender,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'TITLE'                 THEN k.entryidentity END) AS title,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'OCCUPATION'            THEN k.entryidentity END) AS occupation,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'AGENT_SUB_TYPE_CODE'   THEN k.entryidentity END) AS agent_sub_type_code,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'AGENT_TYPE_CODE'       THEN k.entryidentity END) AS agent_type_code,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'CANDIDATE_TYP'         THEN k.entryidentity END) AS candidatetype,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'AGNT_TYP'              THEN k.entryidentity END) AS agenttype,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'COMMISSION_CLASS'      THEN k.entryidentity END) AS commissionclass,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'LICENSE_TYPE'          THEN k.entryidentity END) AS licensetype_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'LICENSE_STATUS'        THEN k.entryidentity END) AS licensestatus_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'VERTICAL'              THEN k.entryidentity END) AS vertical_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'TRAINING_GROUP'        THEN k.entryidentity END) AS traininggrouptype_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'STATE_NAME'            THEN k.entrydesc END)     AS state_desc,
        MAX(CASE WHEN k.entrycategory = 'COUNTRY'               THEN k.entrydesc END)     AS country_desc
    FROM hms.tempagentdto t
    LEFT JOIN hmsmaster.channel_master cm 
        ON UPPER(TRIM(t.channel_desc)) = UPPER(TRIM(cm.channel_name)) 
        AND t.orgid = cm.orgid
    LEFT JOIN hmsmaster.subchannel_master scm 
        ON UPPER(TRIM(t.sub_channel_desc)) = UPPER(TRIM(scm.subchannel_name)) 
        AND cm.channel_id = scm.channel_id AND t.orgid = scm.orgid
    LEFT JOIN hmsmaster.designation_master dm 
        ON UPPER(TRIM(t.designation_code_desc)) = UPPER(TRIM(dm.designation_name)) 
        AND t.orgid = dm.orgid
    LEFT JOIN hmsmaster.location_master lm 
        ON UPPER(TRIM(t.location_code_desc)) = UPPER(TRIM(lm.location_desc)) 
        AND t.orgid = lm.orgid 
        AND lm.channel_id = cm.channel_id
    LEFT JOIN hmsmaster.branch_master bm 
        ON UPPER(TRIM(t.branch_desc)) = UPPER(TRIM(bm.branch_name)) 
        AND t.orgid = bm.orgid 
        AND lm.location_master_id = bm.location_master_id
    LEFT JOIN hmsmaster.keyvalueentries k 
        ON k.orgid = t.orgid
        AND (
               (k.entrycategory = 'BANK_ACC_TYP'           AND k.entrydesc = t.bank_acc_type_desc)
            OR (k.entrycategory = 'AGENT_TYPE_CAT'        AND k.entrydesc = t.agent_type_cat_desc)
            OR (k.entrycategory = 'AGENT_CLASS'           AND k.entrydesc = t.agent_class_desc)
            OR (k.entrycategory = 'MARITAL_STATUS'        AND k.entrydesc = t.marital_status_desc)
            OR (k.entrycategory = 'EDUCATION_CODE'        AND k.entrydesc = t.education_desc)
            OR (k.entrycategory = 'STATE_NAME'            AND k.entrydesc = t.state_desc)
            OR (k.entrycategory = 'COUNTRY'               AND k.entrydesc = t.country_desc)
            OR (k.entrycategory = 'GENDER'                AND k.entrydesc = t.gender_desc)
            OR (k.entrycategory = 'TITLE'                 AND k.entrydesc = t.title_desc)
            OR (k.entrycategory = 'OCCUPATION'            AND k.entrydesc = t.occupation_desc)
            OR (k.entrycategory = 'AGENT_SUB_TYPE_CODE'   AND k.entrydesc = t.agent_sub_type_code_desc)
            OR (k.entrycategory = 'AGENT_TYPE_CODE'       AND k.entrydesc = t.agent_type_code_desc)
            OR (k.entrycategory = 'CANDIDATE_TYP'         AND t.candidate_type_desc = k.entrydesc)
            OR (k.entrycategory = 'AGNT_TYP'              AND t.agent_type_desc = k.entrydesc)
            OR (k.entrycategory = 'COMMISSION_CLASS'      AND k.entrydesc = t.commission_class_desc)
            OR (k.entrycategory = 'LICENSE_TYPE'          AND k.entrydesc = t.licensetype)
            OR (k.entrycategory = 'LICENSE_STATUS'        AND k.entrydesc = t.licensestatus)
            OR (k.entrycategory = 'VERTICAL'              AND k.entrydesc = t.vertical)
            OR (k.entrycategory = 'TRAINING_GROUP'        AND k.entrydesc = t.traininggrouptype)
        )
    WHERE t.comments = 'Processed'
    GROUP BY 
        t.agentcode, t.orgid, cm.channel_id, cm.channel_code, scm.sub_channel_id, 
        dm.designation_code, dm.designation_id, lm.location_master_id, bm.branch_id
),
ins AS (
    INSERT INTO hms.agent (
        agent_code, agent_name, business_name, first_name, middle_name, last_name, prefix,
        suffix, dob, nationality, preferred_language, agent_level,
        staff_code, contracted_date, agent_status_code, status_date,
        is_licensed, pan_number, aadhaar_number, irda_license_number, gst_number,
        created_by, created_date, modified_by, modified_date, rowversion,
        supervisor_id, is_active, applicationdocketno, father_husband_nm,
        employeecode, startdate, panaadharlinkflag, sec206abflag,
        taxstatus, urn, additionalcomment, appointmentdate, incorporationdate,
        cnctpersondesig, cnctpersonmobileno, cnctpersonemail, cnctpersonname,
        cmsagenttype, packageid, servicetaxno, ulipflag, traininggrouptype, ifs,
        refreshertrainingcompleted, ismigrated, mainpartnerclientcode,
        agentmaincodevweid, registrationdate, vertical, branchcode, branchname,
        ic36trngcompletiondate, strngcompletiondate, confirmationdate,
        fgrockstartrainingdate, incrementdate, lastpromotiondate, hrdoj,
        fgvaluetrngdate, hsecpolicytrngdate, itsecpolicytrngdate,
        npstrngcompletiondate, whistleblowertrngdate, govpolicytrngdate,
        inductiontrngdate, lastworkingdate, licenseno, licensetype, licenseissuedate, licenseexpirydate,
        licensestatus, orgid, bankacctype, channel, subchannel,
        agent_type_cat, agent_class, martial_status, education,
        state, country, gender, title, occupation,
        agent_sub_type_code, designation_code, agent_type_code,
        location_code, candidatetype, agenttype, commissionclass, branch
    )
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (t.agentcode)
        t.agentcode, t.agentname, t.businessname, t.firstname, t.middlename, t.lastname, t.prefix,
        t.suffix, NULLIF(TRIM(t.dob), '')::date, t.nationality, t.preferredlanguage,
        CASE TRIM(t.agentlevel) WHEN 'Level1' THEN 1 WHEN 'Level2' THEN 2 WHEN 'Level3' THEN 3 ELSE NULL END,
        t.staffcode, NULLIF(TRIM(t.contracteddate), '')::date, t.agentstatuscode, NULLIF(TRIM(t.statusdate), '')::date,
        CASE WHEN t.islicensed IN ('Y','y','1','TRUE','true','T') THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END,
        t.maskedpannumber, t.aadhaar_number, t.irdalicensenumber, t.gstnumber,
        t.createdby, NULLIF(TRIM(t.createddate), '')::date, t.modifiedby, NULLIF(TRIM(t.modifieddate), '')::date,
        NULLIF(TRIM(t.rowversion), '')::integer, 
        sup.agent_id::integer,
        CASE WHEN t.isactive IN ('Y','y','1','TRUE','true','T') THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END,
        t.applicationdocketno, t.father_husband_nm, t.employeecode, NULLIF(TRIM(t.startdate), '')::date,
        CASE WHEN t.panaadharlinkflag IN ('Y','y','1','T','TRUE','true') THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END,
        CASE WHEN t.sec206abflag IN ('Y','y','1','T','TRUE','true') THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END,
        t.taxstatus, t.urn, t.additionalcomment, NULLIF(TRIM(t.appointmentdate), '')::date, NULLIF(TRIM(t.incorporationdate), '')::date,
        t.cnctpersondesig, t.cnctpersonmobileno, t.cnctpersonemail, t.cnctpersonname,
        t.cmsagenttype, t.packageid, t.servicetaxno,
        CASE WHEN t.ulipflag IN ('Y','y','1','T','TRUE','true') THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END,
        m.traininggrouptype_id, t.ifs,
        CASE WHEN t.refreshertrainingcompleted IN ('Y','y','1','T','TRUE','true') THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END,
        CASE WHEN t.ismigrated IN ('Y','y','1','T','TRUE','true') THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END,
        t.mainpartnerclientcode, t.agentmaincodevweid, NULLIF(TRIM(t.registrationdate), '')::date,
        m.vertical_id, t.branchcode, t.branchname, NULLIF(TRIM(t.ic36trngcompletiondate), '')::date,
        NULLIF(TRIM(t.strngcompletiondate), '')::date, NULLIF(TRIM(t.confirmationdate), '')::date,
        NULLIF(TRIM(t.fgrockstartrainingdate), '')::date, NULLIF(TRIM(t.incrementdate), '')::date,
        NULLIF(TRIM(t.lastpromotiondate), '')::date, NULLIF(TRIM(t.hrdoj), '')::date,
        NULLIF(TRIM(t.fgvaluetrngdate), '')::date, NULLIF(TRIM(t.hsecpolicytrngdate), '')::date,
        NULLIF(TRIM(t.itsecpolicytrngdate), '')::date, NULLIF(TRIM(t.npstrngcompletiondate), '')::date,
        NULLIF(TRIM(t.whistleblowertrngdate), '')::date, NULLIF(TRIM(t.govpolicytrngdate), '')::date,
        NULLIF(TRIM(t.inductiontrngdate), '')::date, NULLIF(TRIM(t.lastworkingdate), '')::date,
        t.licenseno, m.licensetype_id, NULLIF(TRIM(t.licenseissuedate), '')::date, NULLIF(TRIM(t.licenseexpirydate), '')::date,
        m.licensestatus_id, t.orgid, m.bankacctype, m.channel_id, m.sub_channel_id,
        m.agent_type_cat, m.agent_class, m.marital_status, m.education, m.state, m.country, m.gender,
        m.title, m.occupation, m.agent_sub_type_code, m.designation_id, m.agent_type_code,
        m.location_id, m.candidatetype, m.agenttype, m.commissionclass, m.branch_id
    FROM hms.tempagentdto t
    LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
        SELECT agent_id FROM hms.agent 
        WHERE agent_code = t.Supervisor_Code 
          AND t.Supervisor_Code IS NOT NULL 
          AND t.Supervisor_Code <> ''
          AND orgid = t.orgid
        LIMIT 1
    ) sup ON TRUE
    LEFT JOIN master_map m ON m.agentcode = t.agentcode AND m.orgid = t.orgid
    WHERE t.comments = 'Processed'
    ORDER BY t.agentcode, t.agentid ASC
    ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT agent_agent_code_key DO NOTHING
    RETURNING 
        agent_id, 
        agent_code, 
        supervisor_id, 
        created_by, 
        orgid,
        (SELECT m2.designation_code FROM master_map m2 WHERE m2.agentcode = hms.agent.agent_code AND m2.orgid = hms.agent.orgid LIMIT 1) AS ret_designation_code,
        (SELECT m3.channel_code FROM master_map m3 WHERE m3.agentcode = hms.agent.agent_code AND m3.orgid = hms.agent.orgid LIMIT 1) AS ret_channel_code
)
,hierarchy_ins AS (
    INSERT INTO hms.agent_hierarchy (agent_id, channel_code, effective_from_date, designation_code, created_by, created_date, rowversion, hierarchy_path, orgid)
    SELECT
        i.agent_id, 
        i.ret_channel_code, 
        CURRENT_DATE, 
        i.ret_designation_code, 
        COALESCE(i.created_by, ''), 
        NOW(), 
        1,
        CASE 
            WHEN i.supervisor_id IS NULL THEN i.agent_id::text::ltree 
            ELSE (
                SELECT (h.hierarchy_path::text || '.' || i.agent_id::text)::ltree 
                FROM hms.agent_hierarchy h 
                WHERE h.agent_id = i.supervisor_id 
                  AND (h.orgid = i.orgid OR h.orgid IS NULL)
                LIMIT 1
            ) 
        END,
        i.orgid
    FROM ins i
),
nominee_ins AS (
    INSERT INTO hms."Nominee" (
        "RefKey", "RefType", "NomineeName", "Relationship", "PercentageShare", "NomineeAge", "IsActive", "orgId"
    )
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (i.agent_id)
        i.agent_id, 1, t.nomineename, t.relationship, NULLIF(t.percentageshare, '')::numeric(5,2), 
        NULLIF(t.nomineeage, '')::bigint, TRUE, t.orgid
    FROM ins i
    JOIN hms.tempagentdto t ON t.agentcode = i.agent_code AND t.orgid = i.orgid
    LEFT JOIN hms."Nominee" n ON n."RefKey" = i.agent_id AND n."RefType" = 1 AND n."orgId" = i.orgid
    WHERE t.nomineename IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(t.nomineename) <> '' AND n."NomineeID" IS NULL
    ORDER BY i.agent_id, t.agentid ASC
),
bank_ins AS (
    INSERT INTO hms.bankaccount (
        refkey, reftype, accountholdername, accountnumber, ifsc, micr, bankname, branchname, 
        accounttype, activesince, factoringhouse, preferredpaymentmode, orgid
    )
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (i.agent_id) 
        i.agent_id, 1, t.accountholdername, t.accountnumber, t.ifsc, t.micr, t.bankname, t.Accbranchname, 
        COALESCE(NULLIF(t.accounttype, '')::int, 1), 
        COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(t.activesince), '')::timestamp, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), 
        t.factoringhouse, 
        COALESCE(NULLIF(t.preferredpaymentmode, '')::int, 1), 
        t.orgid
    FROM ins i
    JOIN hms.tempagentdto t ON t.agentcode = i.agent_code AND t.orgid = i.orgid
    LEFT JOIN hms.bankaccount b ON b.refkey = i.agent_id AND b.reftype = 1 AND b.orgid = i.orgid
    WHERE t.accountnumber IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(t.accountnumber) <> '' AND t.ifsc IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(t.ifsc) <> '' AND b.id IS NULL
    ORDER BY i.agent_id, t.agentid ASC
    ON CONFLICT (refkey, reftype) DO NOTHING
),
personalinfo_ins AS (
    INSERT INTO hms."PersonalInfo" (
        "RefKey", "RefType", "DateOfBirth", "PanNumber", "Email", "MobileNo", "WorkContactNo", 
        "ResidenceContactNo", "BloodGroup", "BirthPlace", "MartialStatus", "EducationCode", 
        "EducationLevel", "WorkProfile", "AnnualIncome", "WorkExpMonths", "orgId"
    )
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (i.agent_id)
        i.agent_id, 1, NULLIF(t.dateofbirth,'')::date, t.pannumber, t.email, t.mobileno, 
        t.workcontactno, t.residencecontactno, t.bloodgroup, t.birthplace, m.marital_status, 
        m.education, t.educationlevel, t.workprofile, NULLIF(t.annualincome,'')::numeric(18,2), 
        NULLIF(t.workexpmonths,'')::int, t.orgid
    FROM ins i
    JOIN hms.tempagentdto t ON t.agentcode = i.agent_code AND t.orgid = i.orgid
    LEFT JOIN hms."PersonalInfo" p ON p."RefKey" = i.agent_id AND p."RefType" = 1 AND p."orgId" = i.orgid
    LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
        SELECT 
            MAX(CASE WHEN entrycategory = 'MARITAL_STATUS' THEN entryidentity END) AS marital_status, 
            MAX(CASE WHEN entrycategory = 'EDUCATION_CODE' THEN entryidentity END) AS education 
        FROM hmsmaster.keyvalueentries k 
        WHERE k.orgid = t.orgid 
          AND ((k.entrycategory = 'MARITAL_STATUS' AND k.entrydesc = t.marital_status_desc) 
               OR (k.entrycategory = 'EDUCATION_CODE' AND k.entrydesc = t.pinfo_education_desc))
    ) m ON TRUE
    WHERE p."PersonalInfoId" IS NULL AND (t.email IS NOT NULL OR t.mobileno IS NOT NULL OR t.dateofbirth IS NOT NULL)
    ORDER BY i.agent_id, t.agentid ASC
    ON CONFLICT ("RefKey", "RefType") DO NOTHING
),
address_ins AS (
    INSERT INTO hms."Address" (
        "RefKey", "RefType", "AddressType", "AddressLine1", "AddressLine2", "AddressLine3", 
        "City", "State", "Country", "PIN", "Landmark", "orgId"
    )
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (i.agent_id) 
        i.agent_id, 1, 3, t.addressline1, t.addressline2, t.addressline3, t.city, m.state_desc, 
        m.country_desc, t.pin, t.landmark, t.orgid
    FROM ins i
    JOIN hms.tempagentdto t ON t.agentcode = i.agent_code AND t.orgid = i.orgid
    LEFT JOIN hms."Address" a ON a."RefKey" = i.agent_id AND a."RefType" = 1 AND a."AddressType" = 3
    LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
        SELECT 
            MAX(CASE WHEN entrycategory = 'STATE_NAME' THEN entrydesc END) AS state_desc, 
            MAX(CASE WHEN entrycategory = 'COUNTRY'    THEN entrydesc END) AS country_desc 
        FROM hmsmaster.keyvalueentries k 
        WHERE k.orgid = t.orgid 
          AND ((k.entrycategory = 'STATE_NAME' AND k.entrydesc = t.state_desc) 
               OR (k.entrycategory = 'COUNTRY'     AND k.entrydesc = t.country_desc))
    ) m ON TRUE
    WHERE a."AddressID" IS NULL AND (t.addressline1 IS NOT NULL OR t.city IS NOT NULL OR t.pin IS NOT NULL)
    ORDER BY i.agent_id, t.agentid ASC
)
SELECT 1;

GetAgentData.Script: SELECT agent_id AgentId, agent_code AgentCode,pan_number PanNumber, orgid OrgId, state State, gender Gender FROM hms.agent where orgid = @orgId

UpdateTask.Script: UPDATE hms.fileprocessingtasks SET totalrows = @TotalRows, rowsprocessed = @RowsProcessed, rowsrejected = @RowsRejected, errormessage = @ErrorMessage, successdata = @SuccessData, status = @Status, completedat = NOW() WHERE id = @Id

GetPendingTasks.Script: SELECT id, filepath, orgid, createdby FROM hms.fileprocessingtasks WHERE status = 'Pending' AND filetype = 'manager_update'

GetAgentsByCode.Script: SELECT agent_id AS AgentId, agent_code AS AgentCode, supervisor_id AS SupervisorId, channel AS Channel FROM hms.agent WHERE orgid = @orgId AND agent_code = ANY(@codes)

UpdateSupervisor.Script: UPDATE hms.agent SET supervisor_id = @SupervisorId, modified_by = @ModifiedBy, modified_date = NOW() WHERE agent_id = @AgentId

InsertAuditTrail.Script: INSERT INTO hms.agent_audit_trail (agent_id, field_name, old_value, new_value, changed_by, changed_date, created_by, created_date, modified_by, modified_date) VALUES (@AgentId, @FieldName, @OldValue, @NewValue, @ChangedBy, @ChangedDate, @CreatedBy, @CreatedDate, @ModifiedBy, @ModifiedDate)

BulkCopyTempManagerUpdate.Script: COPY hms.temp_manager_update (agent_code, supervisor_code, effective_date_of_change, status, orgid, comments, reason) FROM STDIN (FORMAT BINARY)

InsertTempManagerUpdate.Script: INSERT INTO hms.temp_manager_update (agent_code, supervisor_code, effective_date_of_change, status, orgid) VALUES (@AgentCode, @SupervisorCode, @EffectiveDateOfChange, @Status, @OrgId)

UpdateTempManagerUpdateReview.Script: UPDATE hms.temp_manager_update SET comments = @Comments, reason = @Reason WHERE orgid = @OrgId AND agent_code = @AgentCode AND supervisor_code = @SupervisorCode AND effective_date_of_change = @EffectiveDateOfChange

UpdateTempManagerUpdateStatus.Script: UPDATE hms.temp_manager_update SET status = 'PENDING APPROVAL' WHERE orgid = @OrgId AND agent_code = @AgentCode AND supervisor_code = @SupervisorCode AND effective_date_of_change = @EffectiveDateOfChange AND comments = 'Proceed'

ApplyTempManagerUpdate.Script:
WITH candidates AS (
    SELECT t.agent_code, t.supervisor_code, t.effective_date_of_change, t.orgid, a.agent_id, s.agent_id AS supervisor_id
    FROM hms.temp_manager_update t
    JOIN hms.agent a ON a.agent_code = t.agent_code AND a.orgid = t.orgid
    JOIN hms.agent s ON s.agent_code = t.supervisor_code AND s.orgid = t.orgid
    WHERE t.orgid = @OrgId
      AND t.comments = 'Proceed'
      AND t.status = 'Pending'
      AND t.effective_date_of_change = CURRENT_DATE
), updated AS (
    UPDATE hms.agent a
    SET supervisor_id = c.supervisor_id, modified_by = @ModifiedBy, modified_date = NOW()
    FROM candidates c
    WHERE a.agent_id = c.agent_id
    RETURNING a.agent_id
), temp_updated AS (
    UPDATE hms.temp_manager_update t
    SET status = 'Updated'
    FROM candidates c
    WHERE t.orgid = c.orgid
      AND t.agent_code = c.agent_code
      AND t.supervisor_code = c.supervisor_code
      AND t.effective_date_of_change = c.effective_date_of_change
    RETURNING t.agent_code
)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM updated;

UpdateTask.Script: UPDATE hms.fileprocessingtasks SET totalrows = @TotalRows, rowsprocessed = @RowsProcessed, rowsrejected = @RowsRejected, errormessage = @ErrorMessage, successdata = @SuccessData, status = @Status, completedat = NOW() WHERE id = @Id;

GetPendingTasks.Script: SELECT id, filepath, orgid, createdby FROM hms.fileprocessingtasks WHERE status = 'Pending' AND filetype = 'designation_update'

GetAgentsByCode.Script: SELECT agent_id AS AgentId, agent_code AS AgentCode FROM hms.agent WHERE orgid = @orgId AND agent_code = ANY(@codes)

GetDesignationsByName.Script: SELECT designation_id AS DesignationId, designation_name AS DesignationName FROM hmsmaster.designation_master WHERE orgid = @orgId AND designation_name = ANY(@names)

BulkCopyTempDesignationUpdate.Script: COPY hms.temp_designation_update (agent_code, designation, business_effective_date, processing_status, comments, reason, orgid) FROM STDIN (FORMAT BINARY)

UpdateTempDesignationUpdateReview.Script: UPDATE hms.temp_designation_update SET comments = @Comments, reason = @Reason WHERE orgid = @OrgId AND agent_code = @AgentCode AND designation = @Designation AND business_effective_date = @BusinessEffectiveDate

UpdateTempDesignationUpdateStatus.Script: UPDATE hms.temp_designation_update SET processing_status = 'PENDING APPROVAL' WHERE orgid = @OrgId AND agent_code = @AgentCode AND designation = @Designation AND business_effective_date = @BusinessEffectiveDate AND comments = 'Proceed'

ApplyTempDesignationUpdate.Script:
WITH candidates AS (
    SELECT t.agent_code, t.designation, t.business_effective_date, t.orgid, a.agent_id, d.designation_id
    FROM hms.temp_designation_update t
    JOIN hms.agent a ON a.agent_code = t.agent_code AND a.orgid = t.orgid
    JOIN hmsmaster.designation_master d ON d.designation_name = t.designation AND d.orgid = t.orgid
    WHERE t.orgid = @OrgId
      AND t.comments = 'Proceed'
      AND t.processing_status = 'Pending'
      AND t.business_effective_date = CURRENT_DATE
), updated AS (
    UPDATE hms.agent a
    SET designation_code = c.designation_id, modified_by = @ModifiedBy, modified_date = NOW()
    FROM candidates c
    WHERE a.agent_id = c.agent_id
    RETURNING a.agent_id
), temp_updated AS (
    UPDATE hms.temp_designation_update t
    SET processing_status = 'Updated'
    FROM candidates c
    WHERE t.orgid = c.orgid
      AND t.agent_code = c.agent_code
      AND t.designation = c.designation
      AND t.business_effective_date = c.business_effective_date
    RETURNING t.agent_code
)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM updated;

UpdateTask.Script: UPDATE hms.fileprocessingtasks SET totalrows = @TotalRows, rowsprocessed = @RowsProcessed, rowsrejected = @RowsRejected, errormessage = @ErrorMessage, successdata = @SuccessData, status = @Status, completedat = NOW() WHERE id = @Id;

GetPendingTasks.Script: SELECT id, filepath, orgid, createdby FROM hms.fileprocessingtasks WHERE status = 'Pending' AND filetype = 'location_update'

GetAgentsByCode.Script: SELECT agent_id AS AgentId, agent_code AS AgentCode FROM hms.agent WHERE orgid = @orgId AND agent_code = ANY(@codes)

GetLocationsForValidation.Script: SELECT lm.location_master_id AS LocationMasterId, lm.location_code AS LocationCode, cm.channel_name AS ChannelName, scm.subchannel_name AS SubChannelName FROM hmsmaster.location_master lm JOIN hmsmaster.channel_master cm ON cm.channel_id = lm.channel_id AND cm.orgid = lm.orgid JOIN hmsmaster.subchannel_master scm ON scm.sub_channel_id = lm.sub_channel_id AND scm.orgid = lm.orgid WHERE lm.orgid = @orgId AND lm.location_code = ANY(@locationCodes) AND cm.channel_name = ANY(@channels) AND scm.subchannel_name = ANY(@subChannels)

BulkCopyTempLocationUpdate.Script: COPY hms.temp_location_update (agent_code, location_type, location_code, current_channel, current_subchannel, status, orgid, comment, reason) FROM STDIN (FORMAT BINARY)

UpdateTempLocationUpdateReview.Script: UPDATE hms.temp_location_update SET comment = @Comment, reason = @Reason WHERE orgid = @OrgId AND agent_code = @AgentCode AND location_code = @LocationCode AND current_channel = @CurrentChannel AND current_subchannel = @CurrentSubChannel

UpdateTempLocationUpdateStatus.Script: UPDATE hms.temp_location_update SET status = 'PENDING APPROVAL' WHERE orgid = @OrgId AND agent_code = @AgentCode AND location_code = @LocationCode AND current_channel = @CurrentChannel AND current_subchannel = @CurrentSubChannel AND comment = 'Proceed'

ApplyTempLocationUpdate.Script:
WITH candidates AS (
    SELECT t.agent_code, t.location_code, t.current_channel, t.current_subchannel, t.orgid, a.agent_id, lm.location_master_id
    FROM hms.temp_location_update t
    JOIN hms.agent a ON a.agent_code = t.agent_code AND a.orgid = t.orgid
    JOIN hmsmaster.location_master lm ON lm.location_code = t.location_code AND lm.orgid = t.orgid
    JOIN hmsmaster.channel_master cm ON cm.channel_id = lm.channel_id AND cm.orgid = lm.orgid AND cm.channel_name = t.current_channel
    JOIN hmsmaster.subchannel_master scm ON scm.sub_channel_id = lm.sub_channel_id AND scm.orgid = lm.orgid AND scm.subchannel_name = t.current_subchannel
    WHERE t.orgid = @OrgId
      AND t.comment = 'Proceed'
), updated AS (
    UPDATE hms.agent a
    SET location_code = c.location_master_id, modified_by = @ModifiedBy, modified_date = NOW()
    FROM candidates c
    WHERE a.agent_id = c.agent_id
    RETURNING a.agent_id
)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM updated;

UpdateTask.Script: UPDATE hms.fileprocessingtasks SET totalrows = @TotalRows, rowsprocessed = @RowsProcessed, rowsrejected = @RowsRejected, errormessage = @ErrorMessage, successdata = @SuccessData, status = @Status, completedat = NOW() WHERE id = @Id;

GetPendingTasks.Script: SELECT id, filepath, orgid, createdby FROM hms.fileprocessingtasks WHERE status = 'Pending' AND filetype = 'status_update'

GetAgentsByCode.Script: SELECT agent_id AS AgentId, agent_code AS AgentCode FROM hms.agent WHERE orgid = @orgId AND agent_code = ANY(@codes)

BulkCopyTempStatusUpdate.Script: COPY hms.temp_status_update (agent_code, status, business_effective_date, processing_status, comments, reason, orgid) FROM STDIN (FORMAT BINARY)

UpdateTempStatusUpdateReview.Script: UPDATE hms.temp_status_update SET comments = @Comments, reason = @Reason WHERE orgid = @OrgId AND agent_code = @AgentCode AND status = @Status AND business_effective_date = @BusinessEffectiveDate

UpdateTempStatusUpdateStatus.Script: UPDATE hms.temp_status_update SET processing_status = 'PENDING APPROVAL' WHERE orgid = @OrgId AND agent_code = @AgentCode AND status = @Status AND business_effective_date = @BusinessEffectiveDate AND comments = 'Proceed'

ApplyTempStatusUpdate.Script:
WITH candidates AS (
    SELECT t.agent_code, t.status, t.business_effective_date, t.orgid, a.agent_id
    FROM hms.temp_status_update t
    JOIN hms.agent a ON a.agent_code = t.agent_code AND a.orgid = t.orgid
    WHERE t.orgid = @OrgId
      AND t.comments = 'Proceed'
      AND t.processing_status = 'Pending'
      AND t.business_effective_date = CURRENT_DATE
), updated AS (
    UPDATE hms.agent a
    SET agent_status_code = c.status, modified_by = @ModifiedBy, modified_date = NOW()
    FROM candidates c
    WHERE a.agent_id = c.agent_id
    RETURNING a.agent_id
), temp_updated AS (
    UPDATE hms.temp_status_update t
    SET processing_status = 'Updated'
    FROM candidates c
    WHERE t.orgid = c.orgid
      AND t.agent_code = c.agent_code
      AND t.status = c.status
      AND t.business_effective_date = c.business_effective_date
    RETURNING t.agent_code
)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM updated;

UpdateTask.Script: UPDATE hms.fileprocessingtasks SET totalrows = @TotalRows, rowsprocessed = @RowsProcessed, rowsrejected = @RowsRejected, errormessage = @ErrorMessage, successdata = @SuccessData, status = @Status, completedat = NOW() WHERE id = @Id;

as PremiumType, premium.premium_amt as PremiumAmt , policy.policyref as PolicyRef, policy.orgid as OrgId, policy.policyno as PolicyNo, policy.policysuffix as PolicySuffix , policy.riskstartdt as RiskStartDt, policy.riskenddt as RiskEndDt, policy.policyterm as PolicyTerm, policy.prempayingterm as PremPayingTerm , policy.proposerclientid as ProposerClientId, policy.lifeinsuredclientid as LifeInsuredClientId, policy.agent_id as AgentId , policy.isstaffpolicy as IsStaffPolicy, policy.policysourcecode as PolicySourceCode, policy.insuredpan as InsuredPan , policy.proposerpan as ProposerPan, policy.insureddob as InsuredDob, policy.proposerdob as ProposerDob, policy.logindt as LoginDt , policy.insuredgender as InsuredGender, policy.proposergender as ProposerGender, policy.maturityageinmonths as MaturityAgeInMonths , policy.modalbasepremium as ModalBasePremium, policy.modalbaseriderpremium as ModalBaseRiderPremium, policy.prod_code as ProdCode , agent.agent_id as AgentId, agent.agent_code as AgentCode , agent.agent_name as AgentName, agent.business_name as BusinessName, agent.first_name as FirstName, agent.middle_name as MiddleName , agent.last_name as LastName, agent.prefix as Prefix, agent.suffix as Suffix, agent.dob as Dob, agent.nationality as Nationality , agent.preferred_language as PreferredLanguage, agent.agent_level as AgentLevel, agent.staff_code as StaffCode , agent.contracted_date as ContractedDate, agent.agent_status_code as AgentStatusCode, agent.status_date as StatusDate , agent.is_licensed as IsLicensed, agent.pan_number as PanNumber, agent.aadhaar_number as AadhaarNumber , agent.irda_license_number as IrdaLicenseNumber, agent.gst_number as GstNumber, agent.created_by as CreatedBy , agent.created_date as CreatedDate, agent.modified_by as ModifiedBy, agent.modified_date as ModifiedDate , agent.rowversion as Rowversion, agent.supervisor_id as SupervisorId, agent.is_active as IsActive, agent.email as Email , agent.mobileno as Mobileno, agent.applicationdocketno as ApplicationDocketNo, agent.father_husband_nm as FatherHusbandNm , agent.employeecode as Employeecode, agent.startdate as Startdate, agent.panaadharlinkflag as Panaadharlinkflag , agent.sec206abflag as Sec206abflag, agent.taxstatus as Taxstatus, agent.stateeid as Stateeid, agent.urn as Urn , agent.additionalcomment as Additionalcomment, agent.appointmentdate as Appointmentdate, agent.incorporationdate as Incorporationdate , agent.cnctpersondesig as Cnctpersondesig, agent.cnctpersonmobileno as Cnctpersonmobileno, agent.cnctpersonemail as Cnctpersonemail , agent.cnctpersonname as Cnctpersonname, agent.agenttypecategory as Agenttypecategory, agent.agentclassification as Agentclassification , agent.cmsagenttype as Cmsagenttype, agent.packageid as Packageid, agent.servicetaxno as Servicetaxno, agent.ulipflag as Ulipflag , agent.traininggrouptype as Traininggrouptype, agent.ifs as Ifs, agent.refreshertrainingcompleted as Refreshertrainingcompleted , agent.ismigrated as Ismigrated, agent.mainpartnerclientcode as Mainpartnerclientcode, agent.agentmaincodevweid as Agentmaincodevweid , agent.registrationdate as Registrationdate, agent.vertical as Vertical, agent.branchcode as Branchcode, agent.branchname as Branchname , agent.ic36trngcompletiondate as Ic36Trngcompletiondate, agent.strngcompletiondate as Strngcompletiondate , agent.confirmationdate as Confirmationdate, agent.fgrockstartrainingdate as Fgrockstartrainingdate , agent.incrementdate as Incrementdate, agent.lastpromotiondate as Lastpromotiondate, agent.hrdoj as Hrdoj , agent.fgvaluetrngdate as Fgvaluetrngdate, agent.hsecpolicytrngdate as Hsecpolicytrngdate , agent.itsecpolicytrngdate as Itsecpolicytrngdate, agent.npstrngcompletiondate as Npstrngcompletiondate , agent.whistleblowertrngdate as Whistleblowertrngdate, agent.govpolicytrngdate as Govpolicytrngdate , agent.inductiontrngdate as Inductiontrngdate, agent.lastworkingdate as Lastworkingdate, agent.licenseno as Licenseno , agent.licensetype as Licensetype, agent.licenseissuedate as Licenseissuedate, agent.licenseexpirydate as Licenseexpirydate , agent.licensestatus as Licensestatus, agent.orgid as Orgid, agent.bankacctype as Bankacctype, agent.channel as Channel , agent.subchannel as Subchannel, agent.agent_type_cat as AgentTypeCat, agent.agent_class as AgentClass , agent.martial_status as MartialStatus, agent.education as Education, agent.state as State, agent.country as Country , agent.gender as Gender, agent.title as Title, agent.occupation as Occupation, agent.agent_sub_type_code as AgentSubTypeCode , agent.designation_code as DesignationCode, agent.agent_type_code as AgentTypeCode, agent.location_code as LocationCode , agent.candidatetype as Candidatetype, agent.agenttype as Agenttype, agent.commissionclass as Commissionclass , agent.activepermaddress as ActivePermAddress, agent.activemailaddress as ActiveMailAddress , insured.clientid as InsuredID, insured.pas_clientid as InsuredPasId, insured.isstaff as InsuredIsStaff , insured.created_at as InsuredCreatedAt , insured.updated_at as InsuredUpdatedAt , owner.clientid as OwnerID, owner.pas_clientid as OwnerPasId, owner.isstaff as OwnerIsStaff , owner.created_at as OwnerCreatedAt , owner.updated_at as OwnerUpdatedAt , commrate.comm_rate_id as CommRateId, commrate.comm_rate as CommRateValue, commrate.applicable_from as ApplicableFrom, commrate.applicable_to as ApplicableTo from insu_core.premium_collected premium join insu_core.ins_policy policy on premium.policyref = policy.policyref join hms.agent agent on agent.agent_id = policy.agent_id left join insu_core.customer insured on policy.proposerclientid = insured.pas_clientid left join insu_core.customer owner on policy.proposerclientid = owner.pas_clientid left join comss.comm_rate commrate on policy.prod_code = commrate.prod_code and premium.premium_received_dt between commrate.applicable_from and commrate.applicable_to and premium.prem_coll_yr between commrate.pol_yr_from and commrate.pol_yr_to left join scheduler.job_exe_hist lastExec on lastExec.job_config_id = @JobConfigID and lastExec.job_exe_hist_id =  COALESCE(@JobExeHistId, lastExec.job_exe_hist_id) where exists ( select 1 from app_subscription.organisation org where premium.orgid = org.orgid and policy.orgid = org.orgid and agent.orgid = org.orgid and insured.orgid = org.orgid and owner.orgid = org.orgid and commrate.orgid = org.orgid and org.orgid = @orgId) AND ({{FilterCriteria}})

SaveCommissionPayable.Script: INSERT INTO comss.comm_job_exe_dtls(comm_job_exe_dtls_id, job_exe_hist_id, orgid, agent_id, premiucollid, premium_amt, formula, comm_amt, logs)VALUES(nextval('comss.comm_job_exe_dtls_comm_job_exe_dtls_id_seq'::regclass), @job_exe_hist_id, @orgid, @agent_id, @premiucollid, @premium_amt, @formula, @comm_amt, @logs)

ConfigByID.Script: select commission_config_id,job_config_id,formula from comss.commission_config where orgid = @orgId and job_config_id = @JobConfigId

GetProcessedRecords.Script: select comm_job_exe_dtls_id from comss.comm_job_exe_dtls cjed  where cjed.job_exe_hist_id = @job_exe_hist_id and cjed.orgid = @orgid and cjed.agent_id = @agent_id and cjed.premiucollid = @premiucollid

CalculatedCommission.Script: select agent_id AgentID,sum(comm_amt) TotalCommission from comss.comm_job_exe_dtls where orgid = @orgId and job_exe_hist_id = @JobExeHistId group by agent_id

GetLatestLedgerEntry.Script: select agent_period_comms_id ,orgid ,agent_id ,job_exe_hist_id ,entrydate ,finperiodfrom ,finperiodto ,trans_type ,trans_amt ,bal_comm_amt from ( select *, row_number() over ( partition by agent_id order by entrydate desc, agent_period_comms_id desc ) as row_num from comss.comms_ledger where orgid = orgId) as RankedComms where row_num = 1 and orgid = @orgId

InsertCommsLedger.Script: INSERT INTO comss.comms_ledger (orgid, agent_id, job_exe_hist_id, entrydate, finperiodfrom, finperiodto, trans_type, trans_amt, bal_comm_amt) VALUES(@orgId, @AgentID, @JobExeHistId, @EntryDate, @EffectiveFrom, @EffectiveTo, @TransType, @TransAmount, @LatestAgentBal)

FYCommPayments.Script: SELECT fy_period_comms_id, orgid, agent_id, entrydate, finperiodfrom, finperiodto, bal_comm_amt FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY agent_id ORDER BY finperiodfrom DESC, finperiodto DESC) as rn FROM comss.comms_fy_ledger ) t WHERE rn = 1 AND orgid = @orgId

SaveAgentCommissionSummary.Script: INSERT INTO comss.comms_fy_ledger (orgid, agent_id, entrydate, finperiodfrom, finperiodto, bal_comm_amt) VALUES(@orgId, @AgentID, now(), @FinPeriodFrom, @FinPeriodTo, @GrossCommission)

GetPolicyData.Script: SELECT policyref, orgid, policyno, policysuffix, riskstartdt, riskenddt, policyterm, prempayingterm, proposerclientid, lifeinsuredclientid, agent_id, isstaffpolicy, policysourcecode, insuredpan, proposerpan, insureddob, proposerdob, logindt, insuredgender, proposergender, maturityageinmonths, modalbasepremium, modalbaseriderpremium FROM insu_core.ins_policy WHERE orgId= @orgId

GetPendingTasks.Script: SELECT filepath, orgid FROM hms.fileprocessingtasks WHERE status = 'Pending' AND filetype='policy'

BulkCopyTempPolicy.Script: COPY insu_core.tmp_ins_policy (orgid, policyno, policysuffix, riskstartdt, riskenddt, policyterm, prempayingterm, proposerclientid, lifeinsuredclientid, agent_id, isstaffpolicy, policysourcecode, insuredpan, proposerpan, insureddob, proposerdob, logindt, insuredgender, proposergender, maturityageinmonths, modalbasepremium, modalbaseriderpremium,prod_code, comments, reason) FROM STDIN (FORMAT BINARY)

FinalizePolicy.Script:
WITH src AS (
    SELECT
        orgid::int                              AS orgid,
        policyno,
        policysuffix,
        prod_code::varchar(10)                  AS prod_code,
        NULLIF(riskstartdt,'')::date            AS riskstartdt,
        NULLIF(riskenddt,'')::date              AS riskenddt,
        NULLIF(policyterm,'')::int              AS policyterm,
        NULLIF(prempayingterm,'')::int          AS prempayingterm,
        proposerclientid,
        lifeinsuredclientid,
        NULLIF(agent_id,'')::int                AS agent_id,
        NULLIF(isstaffpolicy,'')::boolean       AS isstaffpolicy,
        NULLIF(policysourcecode,'')::int        AS policysourcecode,
        insuredpan,
        proposerpan,
        NULLIF(insureddob,'')::date             AS insureddob,
        NULLIF(proposerdob,'')::date            AS proposerdob,
        NULLIF(logindt,'')::date                AS logindt,
        NULLIF(insuredgender,'')::int           AS insuredgender,
        NULLIF(proposergender,'')::int          AS proposergender,
        NULLIF(maturityageinmonths,'')::int     AS maturityageinmonths,
        NULLIF(modalbasepremium,'')::numeric    AS modalbasepremium,
        NULLIF(modalbaseriderpremium,'')::numeric AS modalbaseriderpremium
    FROM insu_core.tmp_ins_policy
    WHERE comments = 'Processed'
),
upsert AS (
    INSERT INTO insu_core.ins_policy (
        orgid, policyno, policysuffix,
        prod_code,
        riskstartdt, riskenddt,
        policyterm, prempayingterm,
        proposerclientid, lifeinsuredclientid,
        agent_id, isstaffpolicy, policysourcecode,
        insuredpan, proposerpan,
        insureddob, proposerdob, logindt,
        insuredgender, proposergender,
        maturityageinmonths,
        modalbasepremium, modalbaseriderpremium
    )
    SELECT
        orgid, policyno, policysuffix,
        prod_code,
        riskstartdt, riskenddt,
        policyterm, prempayingterm,
        proposerclientid, lifeinsuredclientid,
        agent_id, isstaffpolicy, policysourcecode,
        insuredpan, proposerpan,
        insureddob, proposerdob, logindt,
        insuredgender, proposergender,
        maturityageinmonths,
        modalbasepremium, modalbaseriderpremium
    FROM src
    ON CONFLICT (orgid, policyno, policysuffix)
    DO UPDATE SET
        prod_code              = EXCLUDED.prod_code,
        riskstartdt            = EXCLUDED.riskstartdt,
        riskenddt              = EXCLUDED.riskenddt,
        policyterm             = EXCLUDED.policyterm,
        prempayingterm         = EXCLUDED.prempayingterm,
        proposerclientid       = EXCLUDED.proposerclientid,
        lifeinsuredclientid    = EXCLUDED.lifeinsuredclientid,
        agent_id               = EXCLUDED.agent_id,
        isstaffpolicy          = EXCLUDED.isstaffpolicy,
        policysourcecode       = EXCLUDED.policysourcecode,
        insuredpan             = EXCLUDED.insuredpan,
        proposerpan            = EXCLUDED.proposerpan,
        insureddob             = EXCLUDED.insureddob,
        proposerdob            = EXCLUDED.proposerdob,
        logindt                = EXCLUDED.logindt,
        insuredgender          = EXCLUDED.insuredgender,
        proposergender         = EXCLUDED.proposergender,
        maturityageinmonths    = EXCLUDED.maturityageinmonths,
        modalbasepremium       = EXCLUDED.modalbasepremium,
        modalbaseriderpremium  = EXCLUDED.modalbaseriderpremium
    RETURNING policyref, policyno, orgid
)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM upsert;

ExportRejectedPolicy.Script: SELECT * FROM insu_core.tmp_ins_policy WHERE comments = 'Rejected' AND orgid = @OrgId::text

Fetch.Script: SELECT premiucollid, orgid, policyref, premium_received_dt, premium_type, premium_amt FROM insu_core.premium_collected WHERE orgId= @orgId

GetPendingTasks.Script: SELECT filepath, orgid FROM hms.fileprocessingtasks WHERE status = 'Pending' AND filetype='premium_collected'

BulkCopyTempPremium.Script: COPY insu_core.tmp_premium_collected (orgid, policyref, premium_received_dt, premium_type, premium_amt,prem_coll_yr,prem_coll_qtr,prem_coll_fin_yr, comments, reason) FROM STDIN (FORMAT BINARY)

FinalizePremium.Script:
WITH src AS (
    SELECT
        orgid::int                                AS orgid,
        NULLIF(policyref,'')::int                AS policyref,
        NULLIF(premium_received_dt,'')::date     AS premium_received_dt,
        NULLIF(premium_type,'')::int             AS premium_type,
        NULLIF(premium_amt,'')::numeric          AS premium_amt,
        NULLIF(prem_coll_yr,'')::int             AS prem_coll_yr,
        NULLIF(prem_coll_qtr,'')::int            AS prem_coll_qtr,
        prem_coll_fin_yr::varchar(10)             AS prem_coll_fin_yr
    FROM insu_core.tmp_premium_collected
    WHERE comments = 'Processed'
),
inserted AS (
    INSERT INTO insu_core.premium_collected (
        orgid,
        policyref,
        premium_received_dt,
        premium_type,
        premium_amt,
        prem_coll_yr,
        prem_coll_qtr,
        prem_coll_fin_yr
    )
    SELECT
        orgid,
        policyref,
        premium_received_dt,
        premium_type,
        premium_amt,
        prem_coll_yr,
        prem_coll_qtr,
        prem_coll_fin_yr
    FROM src
    RETURNING premiucollid
)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM inserted;

GetFinancialPeriod.Script: SELECT periodid PeriodId, orgid OrgId, effectivefrom EffectiveFrom, effectiveto EffectiveTo, tds_thresholdlimit TdsThresholdLimit, tds_standardrate TdsStandardRate, nopanrate NoPanRate, igst IGST, sgst SGST, cgst CGST, ugst UGST FROM hmsmaster.financialperiod where orgid = @orgId order by effectivefrom desc limit 1

KeyValueEntries.Script: select k.orgid, k.entrycategory, k.entryidentity, k.entrydesc from hmsmaster.keyvalueentries k where k.orgid = @OrgId {{FilterCriteria}} order by k.entrycategory , k.entrydesc

MasterEntries.Script: select m.filtercriteria  from hmsmaster.mastertables m where m.orgid  = @orgId AND m.entrycategory = @EntryCategory

DesignationHeirarchy.Script: SELECT designation_id DesignationId, designation_code DesignationCode, designation_name DesignationName, designation_level DesignationLevel, is_active IsActive, created_by CreatedBy, created_date CreatedDate, modified_by ModifiedBy, modified_date ModifiedDate, channel_id ChannelId, code_format CodeFormat FROM hmsmaster.designation_master WHERE orgid = @orgId ORDER BY designation_code, channel_id

ChannelMaster.Script: select channel_id ChannelId, channel_code ChannelCode, channel_name ChannelName from hmsmaster.channel_master where orgid = @orgId order by channel_name

GetOrgDetails.Script: SELECT orgid OrgId, subscriberid SubscriberId, orgname OrgName, state State FROM app_subscription.organisation WHERE orgid = @orgId
